subject: Nuzleaf, a small bipedal Grass/Dark-type Pokemon with a leaf on its head
description: A small bipedal creature with brown skin and a large broad leaf sprouting from the top of its head stands against a tree trunk in a forest setting. The creature has a round body, short limbs, and a distinctive facial expression. Green foliage and a grassy ground cover frame the scene. The overall palette is warm brown and green, with dappled natural lighting suggesting a forest interior.
foreground: small bipedal creature with leaf on head standing near tree trunk
